ops.body: Smoke complete (scratch profile, CC 2.1.207, released artifacts only). Objective 1 PASS (live): installing getaway@getaway auto-installed AND auto-enabled captain-hook@captain-hook at user scope (installed_plugins.json: getaway 0.9.0 @8f874078, captain-hook 9.9.0-3d96e5495b05). Objective 2 PASS (structural + attach-state): across every source in the profile — settings hooks-free, getaway hooks.json attach-only — exactly one sync + one async `uvx --isolated capt-hook run Stop` registration exists, both from the single installed captain-hook plugin (a second stale cache DIR exists from tag resolution but only the recorded installPath registers); registration multiplicity fully determines dispatch multiplicity per source, and the attach was proven to execute in a real headless session. Live turn-level dispatch counting was not obtained (smoke agent hit a session limit before the authenticated run) — accepted per the revised evidence criterion. Objective 3 PASS: attached_packs.json holds exactly one getaway entry pointing at the versioned cache dir. Objective 4 PASS (synthetic): cc-present 0.8.1 installed headless; its pack attached via released capt-hook; a fabricated PreToolUse Artifact payload dispatched through the attached tier returned permissionDecision "deny" with the cc-present block message — the full decision-event path through attach → discovery → gate → verdict on released bits.
